name: Hogwarts Legacy (Eclipse perf)
post_apply_message: Eclipse perf mod. Recommended Deck settings: Steam licence variant staged (EGS/Cracked also in rar). Deletes the optional HD-texture paks (~24.8GB saved). 1280x800, minimum. Eclipse's tested Deck setup: GE-Proton (10-15+), TDP 18, GPU 1800, undervolt -50, SDWEAK. Mod targets a specific game build — if the game updates past it the modded exe can crash; Revert restores stock, then wait for a mod update. Files are NOT in git; stage into local-payloads first.
notes: Eclipse Steam Deck graphics-opt mod. Manifest-only on git; mod files (modified game exe/paks) live in local-payloads off git. Stage with tools/stage-eclipse.py, which copies the 'For Steam Licence/Hogwarts Legacy' variant from the .rar into payload/mod/. Then Apply copies over the game dir, backing up replaced files.
